clave_tumbao.description: Anticipates beat 1 on the 4& tied into the 1, locked with 2-3 or 3-2 Clave

martillo_accent.description: Anchors the 4th beat pop/accent of the bongó and güira rhythm

tresillo_dembow.description: 3+3+2 dotted-eighth pulse pattern common across Caribbean/Afro genres

downbeat_one.description: Heavy emphasis on Beat 1 ('The One') with percussive syncopation on offbeats

kick_lock.description: Mirrors or locks tightly to the primary kick drum transient pattern

walking_quarter.description: Continuous quarter-note pulse walking through harmonic chord changes

one_drop_skank.description: Omits beat 1, anchoring heavily on beat 3 with offbeat skanks

freestyle_syncopated.description: Fluid counterpoint and dynamic rhythmic anchors without a fixed pattern
